Currently, the bibliography only contains Sculley et al. (2015) on hidden technical debt. To systematically cover the eight required citation categories for an ICLR workshop paper on real-world deep learning pitfalls, I need to prioritize references that address distribution shift, benchmarking limitations, and dataset curation. The most critical missing citation is a foundational work that bridges the gap between academic i.i.d. evaluations and real-world non-i.i.d. deployment environments. I will query Semantic Scholar for this paper.
